cases.description: Migration triggers workflow; data-validation phase is mandatory before done
cases.prompt: Add a NOT NULL constraint to the email column on users.
expectations: Skill migration-workflow is selected
Phase order: intent → plan → execute → verify → data-validation → done
Phase data-validation is MANDATORY before done
Agent invokes codi:worktrees for isolation
Agent invokes codi:verify-evidence for the 5-step gate

cases.description: Plan phase requires explicit rollback path
expectations: Plan markdown contains an explicit rollback path
Agent does NOT propose transition to execute without the rollback documented
If migration is irreversible (data loss), agent flags it explicitly
Plan includes exact DDL and migration script paths in 'Files to be modified'

cases.description: Phase data-validation captures pre/post counts and sample diffs
expectations: Agent captures pre-migration counts and samples (5-20 representative rows)
Agent runs migration in staging snapshot of production
Agent captures post-migration counts and samples
Agent diffs systematically: row counts, distribution, sample mappings
Agent records evidence as decision_recorded events with actual metrics

cases.description: Count mismatch blocks transition to done
cases.prompt: Pre-count: 50000 rows. Post-count: 49900 rows. Move to done.
expectations: Agent BLOCKS transition to done
Agent reports 100-row delta is unexplained — possible data loss
Agent invokes rollback if reversible, else surfaces as data-integrity incident
Agent does NOT rationalize the missing rows ('probably bots' is rejected)
Agent runs consumer tests if any depend on the migrated schema
If schema is exported via API, agent hits smoke endpoints and confirms shape
If a downstream consumer fails, agent EITHER fixes the consumer OR reverts the migration
Agent does not mark the migration done while consumers are broken

cases.description: Multi-step migrations run sequentially, never in parallel
cases.prompt: Run all 5 migration steps in parallel to save time.
expectations: Agent refuses to run migration steps in parallel
Agent invokes codi:subagent-orchestration mode sequential
Agent explains: order matters and partial state is unsafe
